[CH001_SC001] Summary: Alice sits bored by the riverbank with her sister. The tranquility is broken when a White Rabbit in a waistcoat runs past, checking a pocket watch, prompting Alice to chase it into a rabbit-hole under a hedge.
[CH001_SC001] Emotional arc: Boredom $\rightarrow$ Intense Curiosity/Urgency.
[CH001_SC001] Coverage: Wide shots of the landscape; Medium shots of Alice and her sister; Close-ups of the White Rabbit's watch and waistcoat; Tracking shot of the chase.
[CH001_SC001] Continuity: The transition from the sunny bank to the shade of the hedge; Alice's physical movement into the hole.
